description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the exo1/dev-base-haskell:latest Docker image, enables an untracked cache for all files, and runs a global before_script 'stack upgrade' before any job. Define a single stage named build. Add a stack-build job that runs in the build stage on docker runners (tagged docker), executes the commands 'stack setup' and then 'stack build', inheriting the global before_script. No artifacts, rules, or deployment targets are specified.
